ProductionVariantInstanceCount.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker endpoint configuration(s) have production variants with less than 2 instances, creating a single point of failure
ProductionVariantInstanceCount.shortDesc: Ensure production variants have at least 2 instances for high availability

NetworkIsolation.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker model(s) do not have network isolation enabled, allowing containers to make outbound network connections
NetworkIsolation.shortDesc: Enable network isolation for SageMaker models to prevent data exfiltration

ModelVpcSettings.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker model(s) are not configured with VPC settings, using public networking instead of private VPC
ModelVpcSettings.shortDesc: Configure VPC settings for SageMaker models to use private networking

EncryptionEnabled.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker notebook instance(s) are not encrypted with a KMS key, leaving data at rest unprotected
EncryptionEnabled.shortDesc: Enable KMS encryption for SageMaker notebook instances

RootAccessDisabled.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker notebook instance(s) have root access enabled, allowing users full system control
RootAccessDisabled.shortDesc: Disable root access on SageMaker notebook instances

NotebookVpcSettings.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker notebook instance(s) are not configured with VPC settings, relying on public networking
NotebookVpcSettings.shortDesc: Configure VPC settings for SageMaker notebook instances

DirectInternetAccess.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker notebook instance(s) have direct internet access enabled, allowing unrestricted outbound connections
DirectInternetAccess.shortDesc: Disable direct internet access for SageMaker notebook instances

InterContainerEncryption.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker training job(s) do not have inter-container traffic encryption enabled
InterContainerEncryption.shortDesc: Enable inter-container traffic encryption for SageMaker training jobs

TrainingNetworkIsolation.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker training job(s) do not have network isolation enabled, allowing network access during training
TrainingNetworkIsolation.shortDesc: Enable network isolation for SageMaker training jobs

VolumeAndOutputEncryption.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker training job(s) do not have volume and output encryption enabled with KMS
VolumeAndOutputEncryption.shortDesc: Enable KMS encryption for training job volumes and outputs

TrainingVpcSettings.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker training job(s) are not configured with VPC settings, using public networking
TrainingVpcSettings.shortDesc: Configure VPC settings for SageMaker training jobs

EndpointAutoScalingConfigured.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker endpoint(s) do not have auto-scaling configured, which may lead to performance issues during traffic spikes or unnecessary costs during low traffic

ModelDataUrlValidation.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker model(s) have model data URLs that are not from S3, which may pose security risks
ModelDataUrlValidation.shortDesc: Ensure model data is loaded from S3 buckets only

TrainingSpotInstancesEnabled.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker training job(s) are not using managed spot instances, missing opportunity for up to 90% cost savings
TrainingSpotInstancesEnabled.shortDesc: Consider using managed spot instances for training jobs

TrainingCheckpointConfigured.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker training job(s) do not have checkpoint configuration, which prevents resuming interrupted training jobs
TrainingCheckpointConfigured.shortDesc: Configure checkpoints for training jobs to enable resumption

EndpointDataCaptureEnabled.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker endpoint configuration(s) do not have data capture enabled, which prevents model quality monitoring and drift detection
EndpointDataCaptureEnabled.shortDesc: Enable data capture for SageMaker endpoints to monitor model quality

NotebookLifecycleConfigAttached.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker notebook instance(s) do not have lifecycle configuration attached, missing automation opportunities for setup and teardown
NotebookLifecycleConfigAttached.shortDesc: Attach lifecycle configuration to notebook instances for automation

EndpointInstanceTypeConsistency.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker endpoint configuration(s) have production variants using different instance types, which may lead to unpredictable performance
EndpointInstanceTypeConsistency.shortDesc: Use consistent instance types across production variants for predictable performance

HyperparameterTuningEarlyStopping.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker hyperparameter tuning job(s) do not have early stopping enabled, missing opportunity to reduce training costs
HyperparameterTuningEarlyStopping.shortDesc: Enable early stopping for hyperparameter tuning jobs to reduce costs

EndpointVariantWeightDistribution.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker endpoint(s) have only one production variant or unbalanced traffic distribution, missing A/B testing opportunities
EndpointVariantWeightDistribution.shortDesc: Consider using multiple variants with balanced traffic for A/B testing

ModelContainerImageSource.^description: {$COUNT} SageMaker model(s) use container images from non-AWS registries, which may pose security risks
ModelContainerImageSource.shortDesc: Use container images from AWS Deep Learning Containers or approved ECR repositories
